_completeMatchWithResult(bytes32,address.details: Complete match with result Called by Matches module to mark match as complete PUBLIC for module delegatecall access

_createMatchGame(uint8,uint8,uint8,uint8.details: Create a new match in game-specific storage Called by Matches module when initializing matches PUBLIC for module delegatecall access

_getActiveMatchData(bytes32,uint8,uint8,.details: Get active match data Called by modules to retrieve match information PUBLIC for delegatecall access (view functions don't need onlyInternal) Default implementation uses shared Match struct - override only if needed

_getMatchPlayers(bytes32).details: Get match players from game-specific storage Called by modules to retrieve player addresses PUBLIC for delegatecall access (view functions don't need onlyInternal) Default implementation uses shared Match struct - override only if needed

_getMatchResult(bytes32).details: Get match result from game-specific storage Called by Matches module to check if match is complete PUBLIC for delegatecall access (view functions don't need onlyInternal)

_getTimeIncrement().details: Get time increment per move Called by Escalation module for timeout calculations PUBLIC for delegatecall access (view functions don't need onlyInternal)

_hasCurrentPlayerTimedOut(bytes32).details: Check if current player has timed out Called by Escalation module to detect stalled matches PUBLIC for delegatecall access (view functions don't need onlyInternal)

_initializeMatchForPlay(bytes32,uint8).details: Initialize match for play Called by Matches module after players are assigned PUBLIC for module delegatecall access

_isMatchActive(bytes32).details: Check if match is active Default implementation uses _getMatchPlayers and _getMatchResult Override only if game needs custom logic

_resetMatchGame(bytes32).details: Reset match game state Called when match needs to be reset PUBLIC for module delegatecall access

_setMatchPlayer(bytes32,uint8,address).details: Set player in match slot Called by Escalation module when replacing players PUBLIC for module delegatecall access Shared implementation for all games

claimTimeoutWin(uint8,uint8,uint8,uint8).details: Claim timeout win against stalled opponent Non-active player can claim win if opponent's time has expired Shared implementation for all games

enrollInTournament(uint8,uint8).details: Enroll in tournament - delegates to Core module and handles hooks Shared implementation for all games - override only if custom logic needed IMPORTANT: Game contracts must mark this as payable and nonReentrant

forceStartTournament(uint8,uint8).details: Force start tournament - delegates to Core module and handles hooks Shared implementation for all games - override only if custom logic needed IMPORTANT: Game contracts must mark this as nonReentrant

getLeaderboard().details: Get leaderboard entries Shared implementation for all games

getPlayerActiveTournaments(address).details: Get tournaments where player is actively competing Shared implementation for all games

getPlayerEnrollingTournaments(address).details: Get tournaments where player is enrolled but not yet started Shared implementation for all games

getPlayerStats().details: Get player earnings (stats) Shared implementation for all games

getRaffleInfo().details: Get raffle information Shared implementation for all games

getRoundInfo(uint8,uint8,uint8).details: Get round information Shared implementation for all games

getTournamentInfo(uint8,uint8).details: Get tournament information Shared implementation for all games

initializeRound(uint8,uint8,uint8).details: Initialize round - must be implemented by game contract Called after tournament starts or when round completes PUBLIC for delegatecall access and for hooks

isMatchEscL2Available(uint8,uint8,uint8,.details: Check if Level 2 escalation is available for a stalled match Level 2 allows advanced players (those in later rounds) to claim the match Shared implementation for all games

isMatchEscL3Available(uint8,uint8,uint8,.details: Check if Level 3 escalation is available for a stalled match Level 3 allows any external player to claim the match Shared implementation for all games

isPlayerInAdvancedRound(uint8,uint8,uint.details: Check if player has advanced past a given round Used for ML2 escalation eligibility Shared implementation for all games
